info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: Truth Social
tags.description: As of 8/27/2025, Truth Social is only letting you view the public profile/posts of prominent users (like Trump and Vance), but requiring auth for everyone else. So sadly most other accounts will not work :(

get.description: As of 8/27/2025, Truth Social is only letting you view the public profile/posts of prominent users (like Trump and Vance), but requiring auth for everyone else. So sadly most other accounts will not work :(

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Truth Social user id. Use this for faster response times. Trumps is 107780257626128497. It is the 'id' field in the profile endpoint.

parameters.name: next_max_id
parameters.description: Used to paginate to next page

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true for a trimmed down version of the response
